description: Configure per-vehicle cost models (fixed, per-hour travel, per-kilometre, per-task-hour) and minimize total fleet cost as the secondary objective after maximising task assignment.

actors.name: Optimization Engine
actors.description: Evaluates route cost at every insertion and swap; selects the solution with lowest total cost among equal-assignment solutions

rules.cost_formula: Route cost = fixed_cost + (cost_per_hour x travel_hours) + (cost_per_km x distance_km) + (cost_per_task_hour x task_hours).
rules.integer_arithmetic: All costs are stored and evaluated as scaled integers internally to avoid floating-point rounding; output is rescaled to user-facing values.
rules.cost_matrix_conflict: A custom cost matrix for a vehicle may not be combined with per_hour or per_km cost parameters.
rules.default_cost_equals_duration: When only cost_per_hour is set to the default, cost equals travel duration in seconds.
rules.heterogeneous_search: When costs are heterogeneous across the fleet, the optimizer tries both availability-sorted and cost-sorted vehicle orderings.
rules.lexicographic_objective: Optimization objective is: 1. Maximise priority-weighted assignment, 2. Maximise assigned count, 3. Minimise total cost, 4. Minimise vehicles used, 5. Minimise duration, 6. Minimise distance.
rules.fixed_cost_incentive: fixed_cost incentivises using fewer vehicles; set to 0 to allow unconstrained vehicle use.

values.description: Cost parameters loaded but no routes built yet
Cost evaluated during initial route construction
Cost delta evaluated for each local search move
Final route costs computed and returned in solution

transitions.description: Heuristic begins inserting tasks into routes
Heuristic solution handed off to local search

given: all tasks that can be assigned are assigned
multiple route configurations have equal assignment
cost_minimised.result: Solution with lowest total cost selected; route and summary objects include cost, duration, distance, and vehicle-count breakdowns.

given: all tasks can be served by a smaller fleet
fixed_cost_avoidance.result: Optimizer consolidates routes to avoid activating high-fixed-cost vehicles.

given: cost_per_km > 0 for at least one vehicle
distance_cost_applied.result: Route cost includes distance component; optimizer balances shorter routes against time efficiency.

cost_reported.result: Each route includes a cost field; summary includes total cost across all routes.

errors.message: Custom cost matrix cannot be combined with per_hour or per_km vehicle cost parameters.
Cost values are too large and would cause an internal overflow.

events.name: solution.cost.minimised
events.description: Least-cost feasible solution selected from all search paths

events.name: solution.fleet.reduced
events.description: Fewer vehicles used to avoid fixed costs while maintaining assignment

events.name: route.cost.distance_weighted
events.description: Route cost includes per-kilometre distance component

events.name: solution.cost.reported
events.description: Final costs reported in solution output
